action.reasoning: Observation: Current best full-test exploration_score=0.6065 (success_rate~0.87-0.89, travel_distance~338m; rooms hardest). Proxy runs give ~0.85 but full evals sometimes fail (this iter: KeyError:'room' in evaluator on per_type). Heuristic (global dijkstra (util**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) + next-hop) strong and compatible. Analysis: Error from per_type missing keys (not all 3 env_types initialized/aggregated, especially if map loading varies between proxy/harness paths); predict.py also had output path fragility and potential truncation in long run_evaluation. Root cause fixed by robust init of per_type+per_type counts, strict --output respect, compact complete code. New alpha=2.0/beta=1.5 emphasizes high-utility clusters more (should boost room success, lower avg dist). Decision: Overwrite with compact COMPLETE predict.py (full select_waypoint, robust config/glob map loading for proxy+test, per-ep try/except, exact JSON contract with all per_type keys + success-only dist + correct exploration_score formula), update train.py to new params+v19. Run train+predict (validate proxy>0.85), submit_eval for official score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
